name: AppTech Payments Corp.
summary: AppTech Payments Corp. is a financial technology company providing digital banking infrastructure, embedded finance, and omnichannel payment solutions. It operates the AppTech Banking Platform, a cloud-native multi-tenant system enabling digital banking, account-based processing, onboarding, and compliance for financial institutions. It also runs FinZeo, a Payments-as-a-Service business serving merchants and ISOs, and acquired Infinitus Pay, Inc. for cross-border payments and multi-currency transaction capabilities.

products.name: AppTech Banking Platform
products.description: Cloud-native, multi-tenant digital banking platform enabling account creation, payment services, onboarding, compliance, and financial workflows for partner financial institutions.

products.name: FinZeo Payments-as-a-Service (PaaS)
products.description: Payments-as-a-Service business serving merchants, ISOs, and technology partners, contributing approximately 10-15% of total revenue in 2025.

products.name: Infinitus Pay Platform
products.description: Cross-border payments and onboarding platform supporting global payment acceptance, international payouts, multi-currency transactions, and automated recipient onboarding.

products.name: Partner Portal
products.description: Reporting and analytics portal providing business metrics, operational insights, and client performance monitoring for partners.

partnerships.description: First partner bank fully online and accepting clients through the AppTech Banking Platform, providing compliant digital banking infrastructure.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
